videos.title: Will This Spacecraft Help Discard Decks Burn Enough?
videos.description:
Sunset Saboteur is looking to station the Entropic Battlecruiser! Discard decks got a ton of new tools but are they good enough??

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-will-this-spacecraft-help-discard-decks-burn-enough
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7266320#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/V4Z7h
